prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约27341→60499→29681→25762→42712，波动较大；2022年因试卷难度变化位次大幅后移至60499，2023–2024年回升至约2.6万，2025年 因新高考专业组拆分（再选化学/不限）导致最低位次后移至42712名，2025年基准约42712名；本省物理类计划2021年171人、2022年183人、2023年178人、2024 年190人、2025年207人，呈逐年扩招趋势；2026年计划236人，较2025年扩招约14%，扩招幅度明显，但考生规模增幅更大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名2026年第80名，近年排名稳定在第79–83名区间，属于中上水平211；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（学生盗用作品参赛 、学术不端通报），可能对报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第77位（一般），短视频曝光量中等；2025年曾出现热门专业投档线暴跌信号，但属局部现象；合肥工业大学本部管理科学与工程获评A级（第五轮学科评估），宣城校区共享本部学科资源；招生专业以机械工程、电气工程、计算机、材料等工科为主，与本部优势学科关 联紧密。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，这些正是物理类招生主力方向，推高报考热度；河南省2026年考生总数约120万（较 2025年约90.7万增长约32%），物理类考生估算约73.4万，竞争显著加剧；合肥工业大学（宣城校区）位于安徽省，与河南省相 邻，地域接受度高；该校在河南招生规模较大（物理类236人），属跨省招生中占比偏高的省份，对河南考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次42712名、2026 年物理类计划扩招14%、河南省考生总数大幅增长约32%、工科专业持续高热等因素；考虑考生规模增幅远超扩招幅度、工科热度不 减，进一步小幅上修；预测2026年物理类最低位次约46502名，区间46002–47002名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 27341 → 60499 → 29681 → 25762 → 42712. In 2022, due to changes in exam difficulty, the ranking dropped sharply to 60499, then rebounded to around 26,000 in 2023–2024. In 2025, due to the split of major groups under the new Gaokao (with re-selection of Chemistry/No Restriction), the minimum ranking fell to 42712, with a baseline of about 42712 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 171 in 2021, 183 in 2022, 178 in 2023, 190 in 2024, and 207 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion trend. In 2026, the plan is 236, an increase of about 14% compared to 2025, a significant expansion, but the growth in the number of examinees is even larger.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 79–83 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (students plagiarizing works for competitions, academic misconduct reports), which may have a certain dampening effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 77th (average), with moderate short video exposure. In 2025, there were signs of a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors, but this was a local phenomenon. The Hefei University of Technology main campus's Management Science and Engineering was rated A (fifth round of discipline evaluation), and the Xuancheng Campus shares the main campus's disciplinary resources. The enrollment majors are mainly engineering fields such as Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Materials, closely related to the main campus's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, and these are the main directions for Physics Category enrollment, boosting application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% from approximately 907,000 in 2025), with an estimated 734,000 Physics Category examinees, significantly intensifying competition. Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Anhui Province, adjacent to Henan Province, with high regional acceptance. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Henan (236 for Physics Category), accounting for a high proportion among cross-provincial enrollments, making it highly attractive to Henan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 42712, the 14% expansion of the Physics Category enrollment plan in 2026, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of examinees in Henan Province, and the sustained high popularity of engineering majors; taking into account that the growth in examinee numbers far exceeds the expansion rate, and the popularity of engineering majors remains high, a slight upward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 46502, with a range of 46002–47002.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Urban Underground Space Engineering (Xuancheng Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 46002–47002, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, New Energy) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Intelligent Science, Electrical Engineering, Software) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Logistics Management, Food Nutrition) as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<46002), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings close to the upper limit (>47002), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a supplement.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category approximately 5241→4934→4867→12326→6410; stable in the 4800–5200 range from 2021–2023, a significant drop to 12326 in 2024 due to exam mode adjustment (liberal arts → history category), rebounding to 6410 in 2025, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 6410; provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 23 from 2021–2023, 20 in 2024, 18 in 2025, showing a yearly reduction trend; 2026 plan is 18, same as 2025, with no further reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; Hefei University of Technology's main campus has Management Science and Engineering rated A-level; history category only offers English and Network and New Media majors, with low relevance to the university's advantageous disciplines; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, which may suppress application psychology to some extent; Douyin popularity ranking is 77th (average), with moderate short video exposure.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: English major has average social popularity with a wait-and-see attitude; Network and New Media major has clearly discouraged social popularity (overall cooling of journalism and communication categories); Henan Province's 2026 total examinee count is approximately 1.2 million, with history category examinees estimated at about 466,000 (an increase of about 32% from 352,000 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition. Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Anhui Province, adjacent to Henan Province, with high regional acceptance; history category enrollment is small (18 students), a small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 6410, unchanged history category enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 32% in total Henan examinees, and the generally cool to cold popularity of English and Network and New Media majors; considering the upward pressure on competition due to the large increase in examinee numbers, a slight upward revision; predicting the 2026 history category minimum ranking to be approximately 6460, with a range of 5960–6960.

Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- English (Xuancheng Campus) (only accepts English language examinees).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History category only has two enrollment majors: English and Network and New Media, with English having slightly higher ranking requirements than Network and New Media. If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5960–6960, English can be a Tier 1 sprint, while Network and New Media serves as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<5960), you can safely apply for English; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>6960), it is recommended to focus on Network and New Media.
